texto: Back in the days when gladiators hacked away at each other, there was always the man who decided whether the defeated should live or die. The job is usually given to the Emperor in movies, but in fact any senior man could have been the designated thumbs-up-thumbs-down guy. The official title for this fellow was...the editor. (evil laughter in background)
explicacao: Orientação direta de Gary Corby sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. A afirmação “Back in the days when gladiators hacked away at each other, there was always the man who decided …” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a humor, fun, work, útil em momentos de trabalho e humor.
